context: Tests whether the agent initializes Biome correctly and customizes biome.json with explicit formatter settings, VCS ignores, and linter configuration rather than committing the default init output unchanged. Also verifies CI command usage.

checklist.name: Init command referenced
checklist.description: SETUP.md mentions bunx @biomejs/biome init as the initialization step

checklist.name: Formatter indent configured
checklist.description: biome.json contains an explicit formatter section with indentWidth or indentStyle set to 2-space

checklist.name: Quote style configured
checklist.description: biome.json has an explicit quote style setting (e.g., javascript.formatter.quoteStyle or formatter.quoteStyle)

checklist.name: Ignore patterns configured
checklist.description: biome.json includes a files.ignore or vcs section that excludes dist/ and/or node_modules/

checklist.name: Check command documented
checklist.description: SETUP.md includes bunx @biomejs/biome check . for running diagnostics locally

checklist.name: CI command with error-on-warnings
checklist.description: SETUP.md includes bunx @biomejs/biome check . --error-on-warnings for CI usage
